scripts.start: concurrently "cd service && node app.js" "cd react && npm start"
scripts.install-all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd react && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../service && npm install
scripts.build: cd react && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.build:prod: npm run install-all && npm run build && cd service && npm install
scripts.ci: npm install --legacy-peer-deps --progress=false --loglevel=error --fetch-retries=3 && cd react && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --progress=false --loglevel=error --fetch-retries=3 && cd ../service && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --progress=false --loglevel=error --fetch-retries=3
